rationale: Use-after-free in session pool after client reset; memory management bug, no specific spec rule violated.

Internal refactor to deduplicate isspace safety checks; no spec behavior involved.
Evergreen RPM package build CI task failure due to doc changes; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
CMake targets file missing libmongocrypt as interface library for mongoc_static; build/packaging, no spec.
Wrong free function (free vs bson_free) on bson_malloc'd RR search result; internal memory bug, no spec rule.
Improvement adding validation that mongocryptd not spawned when bypassAutoEncryption=true; new spec requirement via DRIVERS-787.
Tests with invalid w:99 break against MongoDB 4.3.3+ due to server error message change; test update needed.
4KB SASL buffer overflow with oversized Kerberos tickets; implementation sizing limitation, no specific spec rule.
Add Cyrus SASL testing on Windows in Evergreen; CI infrastructure improvement, no spec behavior.
SDAM monitoring spec: ServerDescriptionChangedEvent must emit only when descriptions differ; driver emits even when equal.
SDAM spec requires msg field value='isdbgrid' for mongos type; driver treats any msg field presence as mongos.
Remove macOS from Travis CI due to timing flakiness; CI infrastructure change, no spec behavior.
Add auto-generated header to RST doc include files from generate-opts.py; tooling/docs only.
CI task to test ENABLE_SSL=AUTO behavior with LibreSSL detection; build/CI issue, no spec behavior.
SSL_OP_NO_RENEGOTIATION undefined when compiling against LibreSSL; build compilation error, no spec behavior.
CMake static library linking requires modification after install on Linux; build/packaging, no spec behavior.
Internal refactor of retryable write error label appending for code consistency; no behavior change.
Empty description; appears to be build/packaging option split. Insufficient detail to classify otherwise.
Documentation request: note MONGOC_QUERY_EXHAUST not applicable to aggregate; docs-only issue.
Windows installation docs need explicit CMake configuration examples; documentation issue, no spec behavior.
Add RHEL 6 Evergreen CI testing variants; CI infrastructure improvement, no spec behavior.
Failpoint-triggered errors not detected as failures; cannot name specific spec rule violated from description.
SDAM spec (DRIVERS-830) requires running full SDAM flow even when server description unchanged; driver skipped it.
Add SDAM test for incompatible server becoming compatible; DRIVERS-923 coordinates cross-driver test addition.
Write concern spec requires propagating WriteConcernError 'errInfo' object; driver was not propagating it.
SPEC-1545 defines that empty int/bool URI option values must be ignored; driver did not handle this correctly.
Wrong output buffer length in MultiByteToWideChar call for CRL setup; Windows implementation bug, no spec rule.
Change stream spec (DRIVERS-973) removed error 216 from ResumableChangeStreamError; driver still included it.
Server stream reused after invalidation on session end failure; internal implementation bug, no spec rule.
Remove deprecated ubuntu1204 and windows-vs2010 Evergreen CI variants; CI infrastructure change only.
Improvement adding hint support to delete per DRIVERS-908 spec addition; new spec feature, not wrong existing behavior.
Assertion placed before buffer reallocation check is logically wrong; internal code correctness bug, no spec rule.
Documentation build fails with Sphinx 2.4 in parallel mode; docs build tooling issue, no spec behavior.
Non-empty server reply assumed to mean stream still valid; internal stream lifecycle bug, no specific spec rule.
CRUD spec: unordered bulk writes must not stop on first error; driver sets must_stop=true on any OP_MSG error.
Adding CRUD spec tests for error on hint with unacknowledged delete; DRIVERS-970 coordinates test authoring.
Explicitly adding RetryableWriteError labels to retryable transaction test failpoints per DRIVERS-826.
Update Evergreen config to install flask instead of bottle for OCSP responder tests per DRIVERS-977.
TSAN data race: handle_not_master_error calls topology_request_scan without locking topology mutex.
TSAN data race: APM callback setter accesses shared topology state without lock; thread safety bug, no spec rule.
Compiler warnings on mingw-w64 with -pedantic; build/compilation issue, no spec behavior.
FLE tests fail with duplicate key errors on admin DB; updating test setup to non-admin DB per DRIVERS-1194.
Flaky test /Client/last_write_date/pooled on Windows; CI test reliability issue, no spec behavior.
SDAM spec silent on handling wrong set name in single topology; DRIVERS-980 required to clarify correct behavior.
Server selection spec: MUST send read pref for secondaryPreferred with max_staleness to mongos; driver omits it.
Tests check exact 'ns not found' string; SERVER-41365 changed format, tests need substring matching instead.
SRV polling finds new hosts but never updates topology description or scanner; DNS seedlist spec requires propagation.
Windows thread handles not closed after WaitForSingleObject; resource leak, no spec rule violated.
Use _beginthreadex instead of CreateThread on Windows for C runtime safety; implementation detail, no spec.
